stages.purpose: After the cancellation function becomes available, cancel the supplied stable ID exactly once.

state_assertions: Before the follow-up, lib-113 remains active.

follow_up_turns.content: The simulator now exposes library_cancel. Continue the original request without calling the lookup functions.
